message:
feat(fsfs): extend runtime with additional query paths and expand benchmark baseline matrix

runtime.rs: add 216 lines of additional query execution paths and
result processing logic.

benchmark_baseline_matrix.rs: substantially expand the benchmark test
suite with additional matrix configurations, golden fixture comparisons,
and regression detection thresholds.

Update benchmark golden fixtures (medium.json, small.json, tiny.json)
with revised baseline values reflecting the expanded runtime capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
